CREATE TABLE user_keys (user_id INT, key_id VARCHAR(255), key_type VARCHAR(50), certificate TEXT, private_key TEXT);
SELECT USER_KEY_STORE (user_id, key_id, key_type, 2, '', xenc_pkcs12_export (key_id, 'CA Certificate', '')) FROM user_keys WHERE user_id IN (SELECT user_id FROM user_keys WHERE key_type = 'X.509');
SELECT xenc_pkcs12_export (key_id, 'CA Certificate', '') AS pkcs12_file FROM user_keys WHERE key_type = 'X.509' AND user_id = (SELECT MAX(user_id) FROM user_keys);
SELECT user_id, xenc_pkcs12_export (key_id, 'CA Certificate', '') AS exported_key FROM user_keys WHERE key_type IN (SELECT DISTINCT key_type FROM user_keys WHERE user_id = 1);
WITH PKCS12_EXPORT AS (SELECT xenc_pkcs12_export (key_id, 'CA Certificate', '') AS pkcs12_file FROM user_keys WHERE user_id = 1) SELECT * FROM PKCS12_EXPORT;
SELECT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM user_keys WHERE user_id = 1 AND key_type = 'X.509' AND xenc_pkcs12_export (key_id, 'CA Certificate', '') IS NOT NULL);
SELECT user_id, key_id, xenc_pkcs12_export (key_id, 'CA Certificate', '') AS exported_key FROM user_keys WHERE private_key LIKE '%PRIVATE_KEY_CONTENT%' AND user_id < 3;
DELETE FROM user_keys WHERE key_type = 'X.509' AND user_id = (SELECT user_id FROM user_keys WHERE key_id = 'id_rsa');
